---
title: "Install the development version"
subtitle: "Download and try the latest *Gribouille* build from `main`, ahead of Typst Universe."
toc: true
engine: markdown
---

The development build tracks the `main` branch and is published here as a downloadable package.
Use it to try unreleased changes before they reach [Typst Universe](https://typst.app/universe/package/gribouille).

::: {.callout-warning}
This is not a stable release.
It is rebuilt from `main` and can change without notice, so pin a stable version for production documents.
:::

## Install as a local package

Download the archive, unpack it into Typst's local package directory, then import it.
The version is the current build date, `{{< env DEV_VERSION >}}`.

::: {.panel-tabset}

### macOS

```bash
VERSION="{{< env DEV_VERSION >}}"
DEST="${HOME}/Library/Application Support/typst/packages/local/gribouille/${VERSION}"

curl -fLO https://m.canouil.dev/gribouille/dev/gribouille.tar.gz
mkdir -p "${DEST}"
tar -xzf gribouille.tar.gz --strip-components=1 -C "${DEST}"
```

### Linux

```bash
VERSION="{{< env DEV_VERSION >}}"
DEST="${XDG_DATA_HOME:-${HOME}/.local/share}/typst/packages/local/gribouille/${VERSION}"

curl -fLO https://m.canouil.dev/gribouille/dev/gribouille.tar.gz
mkdir -p "${DEST}"
tar -xzf gribouille.tar.gz --strip-components=1 -C "${DEST}"
```

### Windows

```powershell
$Version = "{{< env DEV_VERSION >}}"
$Dest = "$env:APPDATA\typst\packages\local\gribouille\$Version"

Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://m.canouil.dev/gribouille/dev/gribouille.zip -OutFile gribouille.zip
Expand-Archive -Path gribouille.zip -DestinationPath $env:TEMP -Force
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $Dest | Out-Null
Move-Item -Path "$env:TEMP\gribouille-$Version\*" -Destination $Dest -Force
```

:::

Then import it:

```typst
#import "@local/gribouille:{{< env DEV_VERSION >}}": *
```

## Import without installing

Extract the archive anywhere and import the entry point by path:

```typst
#import "/path/to/gribouille-{{< env DEV_VERSION >}}/lib.typ": *
```
